step_rationale: Endothelial nitric-oxide synthase inhibitor; oxidative stress impairs endothelial function.
mechanism: Symmetric dimethylarginine inhibits nitric-oxide synthase, promoting endothelial dysfunction and erosion.

references.title: Lipoproteins and Cardiovascular Redox Signaling: Role in Atherosclerosis and Coronary Disease.
Methylated arginines in stable and acute patients with coronary artery disease before and after percutaneous revascularization.
